class: OPERATOR-DIRECTED contract reconciliation — aligning the exported /state wire to a promise the docs already made. Explicitly NOT Lane A: this is not under-testing an already-real surface; the wire genuinely did not carry the schema the docs (COMPATIBILITY.md, CHANGELOG 0.1.0, separability.rs) all asserted.
slice: Add the documented nq.witness_packet.v1 schema field to the GET /state PublisherState envelope + pin it
preceded_by: read-only nq-witness backlog audit (this session) + direct verification: PublisherState (wire.rs) carried no schema/version field, contradicting COMPATIBILITY.md:24,43 + CHANGELOG 0.1.0 + separability.rs:13. what_executed.constant: crates/nq-core/src/wire.rs — pub const PUBLISHER_STATE_SCHEMA = "nq.witness_packet.v1" (documented value; no canonical constant existed — WITNESS_SCHEMA=nq.witness.v1 is the DIFFERENT nq-core WitnessPacket surface).
what_executed.field: PublisherState.schema: Option<String>, #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = Option::is_none)], placed first so it serializes first (matches COMPATIBILITY.md:43 shape).
what_executed.constructor: PublisherState::current(host, collected_at, collectors) stamps schema=Some(PUBLISHER_STATE_SCHEMA). Single honest producer path — resolves the struct-field source fallout cleanly (operator caution).
what_executed.producer_update: crates/nq-witness/src/collect/mod.rs — collect_state now builds via PublisherState::current (the only construction site in the workspace).
what_executed.tests_golden: separability.rs witness_emit_carries_versioned_envelope_schema: collect_state output carries schema=nq.witness_packet.v1 + golden top-level key set {collected_at,collectors,host,schema}. Fixed the separability.rs:13 doc claim (now TRUE, not merely less false).
what_executed.docs: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] ### Fixed entry; COMPATIBILITY.md needed NO change (now satisfied, was already promising it).

compatibility_and_source_breakage_note.source_breakage: Adding a public field to PublisherState would break struct-literal construction. Resolved with the PublisherState::current constructor; the ONLY construction site (collect_state) updated. No other workspace site constructs the struct.
compatibility_and_source_breakage_note.deserialization_compat: Field is Option<String> + serde(default) + skip_serializing_if. Old/external schema-less payloads (e.g. nq-monitor/tests/e2e.rs builds JSON without schema) deserialize to schema=None — verified by full regression passing. NO source break at deserialize sites (fetch_state, nq-monitor pull, e2e).
compatibility_and_source_breakage_note.anti_laundering: Absence is NEVER laundered into v1 (operator caution honored): missing schema -> None (pinned by publisher_state_absent_schema_deserializes_to_none_not_v1), and None re-serializes to an ABSENT field, not null (pinned by none_schema_serializes_to_absent_field). The producer always emits Some(v1).
compatibility_and_source_breakage_note.wire_change_class: Additive. The v1 envelope finally carries its v1 label; consumers ignoring unknown fields are unaffected; this is the additive coexistence COMPATIBILITY.md already sanctions, not a breaking bump.
compatibility_and_source_breakage_note.residual: Three docs (COMPATIBILITY.md, CHANGELOG 0.1.0, separability.rs) had asserted the schema before the wire carried it — that drift is now closed. nq-monitor PULL side does not yet pin/refuse on schema value (it tolerates None); enforcing a consumer-side schema check would be a SEPARATE operator-directed slice (not in this scope).
